title: Space and Constellations
description: Explore the depths of space through a telescope lens! Discover constellations, draw celestial maps, and unlock magical stellar abilities.
body:
✨ Space & Constellations: The Path of Stars 🔭 Look beyond the horizon. This mod completely reimagines the Minecraft night sky, turning it from a static backdrop into a deep, interactive gameplay mechanic. No longer is the night just for sleeping — it's for discovering the ancient secrets of the Universe.

🌌 Main Features: The Advanced Telescope: Craft a functional high-tech telescope and explore a massive, detailed celestial map with nebulae, planets, and moving satellites.
Constellation Mapping: Discover legendary constellations like Ursa Major, Leo, Capricorn, and the new Pisces. Manually connect their stars to unlock forbidden knowledge.
Stellar Progression: Catch falling stars in real-time through your spyglass to obtain Stardust. Use it along with your experience to buy permanent mystical upgrades.
Celestial Events: Witness rare Meteor Showers during the New Moon. Experience the sky lighting up with thousands of sparks, making star-catching easier and faster.

📺 Watch the Mod in Action

<center>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/RYPdD5F-HQQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</center>


🎨 How to start?
1. **Craft the Telescope:** Gather material.
2. **Wait for a clear night:** It won't work in the rain!
3. **Map the Constellations:** Right-click the telescope and start dragging lines between the stars.
4. **Upgrade your abilities:** Open the side menu once a constellation is discovered to claim your powers.
